org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.classgen
Generates compiled classes.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.javaclassir
Intermediate representation before JVM byte code compilation.

    Compiles a top level fun.
    JavaClassIr
    ValCaptureFastFunCompiler.compileControlOverridden(FastFunItree fun)
    Copmiles an val-capture fast fun for the case that a local var of a control fun is overridden on the top level.
    JavaClassIr
    ValCaptureFastFunCompiler.compileControlUnchanged(FastFunItree fun)
    Copmiles an val-capture fast fun for the case that local vars of control funs are unchanged on the top level.
    JavaClassIr
